cards.pinyin: Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ xiǎng de màn.

cards.pinyin: Wǒ hái bù zhīdào diǎn shénme.

cards.pinyin: Nǐ néng tuījiàn yí ge ma?

cards.hanzi: 你能在地图上给我看吗？

cards.translation: I want to take a taxi.

cards.translation: Do you have any rooms available?
